testcase.name: Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - empty state returns empty array
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - create new company
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - create second company
Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - returns both companies
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - activates company
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - only one company can be active (partial unique index)
Company API E2E › POST /api/companies - blank name returns 400
Company API E2E › DELETE /api/companies/{id} - removes company
Company API E2E › GET /api/companies - deleted company no longer in list
Company API E2E › PATCH /api/companies/{id}/activate - deleted company returns 404
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - empty list
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - create test case with path
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - create second test case
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - returns both
TestCase API E2E › PUT /api/test-cases/{id} - updates test case
TestCase API E2E › POST /api/test-cases - missing title returns 400
TestCase API E2E › DELETE /api/test-cases/{id} - removes test case
TestCase API E2E › GET /api/test-cases?productId={id} - one remains
TestCase API E2E › DELETE /api/products/{id} - cascades delete to test cases
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - empty product list
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - create WEB product
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - create MOBILE product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - returns both products
Product API E2E › PUT /api/products/{id} - updates product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - reflects updated product
Product API E2E › POST /api/products - missing name returns 400
Product API E2E › DELETE /api/products/{id} - removes product
Product API E2E › GET /api/products?companyId={id} - only one product remains
Product API E2E › DELETE /api/companies/{id} - cascades delete to products
Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - empty segment list
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create root segment
Segment API E2E › POST /api/segments - create child segment
Segment API E2E › GET /api/segments?productId={id} - returns both segments
Segment API E2E › PUT /api/segments/{id} - update segment name
Segment API E2E › DELETE /api/segments/{id} - delete root cascades children
Company List Page › should display Companies heading on page load
Company List Page › should add a company when name is entered
Company List Page › should activate company and show Active badge
Company List Page › should delete company when confirmed
Company List Page › should navigate to products on company click
Test Case Page › should display empty test case list
Test Case Page › should add a test case and display it
Test Case Page › should display test cases created via API
Test Case Page › should delete a test case
Test Case Page › should toggle between input and tree view
Test Case Page › should show path on test case card
Product List Page › should display product form after navigating to company
Product List Page › should add a WEB product
Product List Page › should display products created via API
Product List Page › should delete product when confirmed
Product List Page › should navigate to test cases on product click
Product List Page › should show empty state when no products exist
